<title>Maintenance Cycle 1: Graph Policy & Context Package Improvement</title>

<content>
Cycle opened with directive=refine-graph-policy. Worked on recording graph policy and context package improvement candidates. Memory search for 'graph|policy' returned normalized query. Queue was empty. No active owner task. Policy layers=maintenance. Allowed tools: memory.find, memory.prune, memory.save, queue.list, agent.done. Blocked tools include graph.state, graph.next, etc. Preferred action: bounded maintenance bookkeeping or no-op close.
</content>
